title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon, to enter into a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) with the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) Region IV-A, represented by its Regional Director for the implementation of Balay Silangan Reformation Program (BSRP) in Los Baños, Laguna.
